Record Class UserProfile

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.profile.UserProfile
Record Components:
uuid - the player's Mojang UUID
xfUserId - the linked XenForo user ID, or null if not linked
mcUsername - the player's current Minecraft username
forumUsername - the linked forum username, or null if not linked
firstJoined - epoch timestamp of the player's first join
lastSeen - epoch timestamp of the player's last seen time
playtime - cumulative playtime in seconds
entitlements - list of active entitlements (cosmetics, ranks, etc.)
public record UserProfile(UUID uuid, Integer xfUserId, String mcUsername, String forumUsername, long firstJoined, long lastSeen, long playtime, List<UserProfile.Entitlement> entitlements) extends Record
Represents a cached player profile in memory. This record stores both persistent database data and temporary session information used by various systems like chat prefixes, playtime tracking, and entitlement checks.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    UserProfile.Entitlement
    Represents a specific entitlement owned by a player.

  • Constructor Details

    • UserProfile

      public UserProfile(UUID uuid, Integer xfUserId, String mcUsername, String forumUsername, long firstJoined, long lastSeen, long playtime, List<UserProfile.Entitlement> entitlements)
      Creates an instance of a UserProfile record class.
      Parameters:
      uuid - the value for the uuid record component
      xfUserId - the value for the xfUserId record component
      mcUsername - the value for the mcUsername record component
      forumUsername - the value for the forumUsername record component
      firstJoined - the value for the firstJoined record component
      lastSeen - the value for the lastSeen record component
      playtime - the value for the playtime record component
      entitlements - the value for the entitlements record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
